mapper.update: UPDATE `admin_operation_log` SET `scope_type` = #{scopeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `action_type` = #{actionType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `operator_user_id` = #{operatorUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, `target_user_id` = #{targetUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, `project_id` = #{projectId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, `role_code` = #{roleCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `permission_code` = #{permissionCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `grant_type` = #{grantType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `before_snapshot_json` = #{beforeSnapshotJson, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, `after_snapshot_json` = #{afterSnapshotJson, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, `remark` = #{remark, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, `created_at` = #{createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE `admin_operation_log_id` = #{adminOperationLogId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
